title: Cross-dictionary source-siglum aliases (reviewed seed)
description: Maps fold-key variants of source sigla to a shared canonical id, for cross-dictionary citation comparison. The diacritic/case fold in source-siglum.mjs already aligns most variants (MBh/MBH -> mbh, RV/ṚV -> rv); this table only records the abbreviation-scheme differences the fold cannot catch. It is a SEED: grow it from the source-siglum review queue. Keys under 'aliases' are matched after folding.
